sections.paragraph:
[Halah] pr.n. of a province of Assyria, whither a portion of the ten tribes were taken by Shalmanezer; it is probably Calachene (Καλαχηνή, Strab. xvi. 1; Καλακινὴ, Ptol. vi. 1), the northern province of Assyria, on the confines of Armenia, 2Ki 17:6 18:11 . Compare בֶּלַח.

[חַלְחוּל Halhul, pr.n. Jos 15:38, now called Hŭlhûl, حلحول, Rob. i. 319.]
